targets.rawSql:
SELECT agent_name, status, count(*) AS runs
FROM extraction_runs
WHERE started_at >= now() - interval '24 hours'
GROUP BY agent_name, status
ORDER BY runs DESC;

SELECT
  agent_name,
  status,
  avg(extract(epoch FROM (coalesce(finished_at, now()) - started_at))) AS avg_duration_seconds
FROM extraction_runs
WHERE started_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY agent_name, status
ORDER BY avg_duration_seconds DESC;

SELECT
  agent_name,
  model_name,
  sum(coalesce((usage->>'input_tokens')::bigint, 0)) AS input_tokens,
  sum(coalesce((usage->>'output_tokens')::bigint, 0)) AS output_tokens
FROM extraction_runs
WHERE started_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY agent_name, model_name
ORDER BY input_tokens + output_tokens DESC;

SELECT agent_name, finding_type, status, critic_status, count(*) AS findings
FROM agent_findings
WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
GROUP BY agent_name, finding_type, status, critic_status
ORDER BY findings DESC;
